payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden chair shown close-up with carved cabriole-style legs, a visible stretcher between legs, glossy finish and a dark (possibly upholstered) seat; photographed approximately 0.5 m from the camera.
